trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close above $0.192 after a retest of the $0.19 support
confluence_signals: EXTREME short crowd (10th percentile L/S Ratio) - contrarian bullish
Price falling with LOW volume - weak selling pressure
Fear & Greed Index at Extreme Fear (12) - contrarian buy signal
Price at strong support ($0.19) and consolidating
Funding velocity accelerating negative with low perp premium - potential capitulation bounce
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Extreme short crowd (10th pct L/S ratio), price falling on low volume, Extreme Fear index, and price at strong support combine for high probability contrarian long. Funding velocity accelerating negative suggests a potential capitulation bounce.

The weak selling volume and smart money support provide conviction for a bounce.

confluence_signals: Conflicting sentiment signals (Extreme bearish funding rate vs. Extreme long L/S ratio)
Price rising with LOW volume - weak buying conviction
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: The extreme bearish funding rate (potential short squeeze fuel) directly contradicts the extreme long crowd (contrarian bearish L/S ratio), leading to unclear direction and high risk. Low volume on price rise further reduces conviction.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close below $0.178 after testing $0.18 resistance or clear rejection from $0.18
confluence_signals: Price rising with LOW volume - weak buying pressure, potential exhaustion
MACD 1h bearish EXPANDING - bearish momentum building
Perp Premium at 98th percentile - extreme long demand, contrarian bearish signal
Price near 7d high and strong resistance ($0.18)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Price rising on low volume, bearish expanding MACD, extreme perp premium (98th percentile), and price near 7d high/resistance ($0.18) combine for a high probability contrarian short due to potential long overheating and exhaustion.

results.cross_asset_insight: The prevailing 'Extreme Fear' market sentiment (F&G Index=12) combined with low volume across all assets suggests a market ripe for contrarian bounces, particularly in assets like SUSHI with an extreme short crowd, while high perp premiums (THETA) indicate potential long overheating.
